class.name: AbilitySystemComponent
class.brief_description: Core component for managing abilities, attributes, and effects on an actor.
class.description: The [AbilitySystemComponent] (ASC) is the central hub for all logic on an actor. It manages abilities, attributes, and effects. [b]CRITICAL REQUIREMENT:[/b] This component [b]MUST[/b] be a child of [CharacterBody2D] or [CharacterBody3D]. The component will show an error and disable itself if placed under any other node type. The CharacterBody parent is automatically detected and cached. [b]Example Usage:[/b] [codeblock] func _ready(): asc.try_activate_ability(fireball_resource) [/codeblock] [b]Node References:[/b] The ASC does [b]NOT[/b] cache sibling nodes automatically. Developers should use [code]@onready[/code] variables in their Actor scripts to cache nodes like [AnimationPlayer] and pass them directly to the execution methods ([method play_montage], [method play_sound], etc.).

method.name: add_attribute_set
method.description: Adds an attribute set to this component. This allows the component to track and manipulate the attributes defined in the set.

method.name: add_tag
method.description: Adds a tag to this actor. This can be used to trigger logic or modify behavior based on the presence of the tag.

method.name: apply_ability_container
method.description: Initializes the component using an [AbilitySystemAbilityContainer]. This process registers the container's [AbilitySystemAttributeSet], sets initial attribute values, grants pre-unlocked abilities, and applies effects and tags.

method.name: apply_effect_spec_to_self
method.description: Applies an effect specification to this actor. The spec contains the calculated magnitudes and duration logic.

method.name: apply_effect_spec_to_target
method.description: Applies an effect specification instantiated from this actor's catalog to another target's [AbilitySystemComponent].

method.name: execute_cue
method.description: Triggers a cue associated with the given tag. Cues are used for visual and audio feedback.

method.name: get_active_effects_debug
method.description: Returns a list of all currently active effect specifications. Primarily used for debugging.

method.name: get_animation_player
method.description: Returns the default animation node.

method.name: get_attribute_value
method.description: Returns the current value of the specified attribute.

method.name: get_audio_player
method.description: Returns the default audio node.

method.name: get_cue_resource
method.description: Returns the resource registered for the given cue tag.

method.name: get_granted_abilities_debug
method.description: Returns a list of all currently granted ability specifications. Primarily used for debugging.

method.name: get_node_ptr
method.description: Returns the node pointer registered under the given name, or [code]null[/code] if not found.

method.name: get_owned_tags
method.description: Returns the container holding all tags currently owned by this actor.

method.name: give_ability
method.description: Grants a new ability to the actor.

method.name: has_tag
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the actor currently possesses the specified tag.

method.name: is_montage_playing
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the specified montage (animation) is currently playing on the given [param target] node. If [param target] is [code]null[/code], it uses the default animation player set via [method set_animation_player]. Supports [AnimationPlayer], [AnimatedSprite2D], and [AnimatedSprite3D].

method.name: make_outgoing_spec
method.description: Creates a new effect specification from a resource. [b]Blueprint Validation:[/b] Validates that the effect is formally registered in the [b]AbilitySystemAbilityContainer[/b] of this component. Outgoing effects (attacks, buffs, debuffs) must be part of the archetype contract to be instantiated.

method.name: play_montage
method.description: Plays a montage (animation) on the specified [param target] node. If [param target] is [code]null[/code], it uses the default animation player set via [method set_animation_player]. Supports [AnimationPlayer], [AnimatedSprite2D], and [AnimatedSprite3D].

method.name: play_sound
method.description: Plays the specified [param sound] ([AudioStream]) on the [param target] node. If [param target] is [code]null[/code], it uses the default audio player set via [method set_audio_player]. Supports [AudioStreamPlayer], [AudioStreamPlayer2D], and [AudioStreamPlayer3D].

method.name: register_cue_resource
method.description: Registers a cue resource to be used for visual or audio effects when a specific tag is triggered.

method.name: register_node
method.description: Registers a node with a unique name to be used by the Cue system. This allows Cues to target specific nodes (like a "weapon_vfx" marker) without needing hardcoded paths.

method.name: register_task
method.description: Registers an asynchronous task. Tasks are typically used within abilities to wait for events, delays, or animations.

method.name: remove_active_effect
method.description: Removes a specific active effect specification from the actor.

method.name: remove_granted_ability
method.description: Removes a granted ability specification, effectively revoking the actor's ability to use it.

method.name: remove_tag
method.description: Removes a tag from the actor.

method.name: set_animation_player
method.description: Sets the default node used for playing animations. Used as fallback by [method play_montage].

method.name: set_attribute_base_value
method.description: Directly sets the base value of an attribute. Current value will be updated accordingly.

method.name: set_audio_player
method.description: Sets the default node used for playing audio. Used as fallback by [method play_sound].

method.name: try_activate_ability
method.description: Attempts to activate the given ability. The ability must have been granted to this actor (e.g., via [method give_ability]) to be successful. Returns [code]true[/code] if successfully activated.

method.name: unregister_cue_resource
method.description: Unregisters a cue resource associated with a tag.

method.name: unregister_node
method.description: Unregisters a previously registered node.

members.member: The [AbilitySystemAbilityContainer] that defines the archetypal data for this actor.

signal.name: ability_failed
signal.description: Emitted when an ability fails to activate.

signal.name: attribute_changed
signal.description: Emitted when an attribute value changes.

signal.name: cooldown_ended
signal.description: Emitted when a cooldown period ends.

signal.name: cooldown_started
signal.description: Emitted when a cooldown period starts.

signal.name: effect_applied
signal.description: Emitted when an effect is applied.

signal.name: effect_removed
signal.description: Emitted when an effect is removed.

signal.name: tag_changed
signal.description: Emitted when a tag is added or removed.

signal.name: tag_event_received
signal.description: Emitted when a tag event or cue is received.
